author: mark
text:
prime --json: route 'sync complete' to stderr

cmd_sync printed "sync complete" via println!, which leaks to stdout
when cmd_prime invokes it before emitting JSON — breaking
`bl prime --json | jq` and similar pipelines. Switched to eprintln!
since the line is a status diagnostic, not part of any structured
output contract. Updated existing prime tests to parse stdout as a
single trimmed JSON document, added a regression test, and flipped
the no_git sync test to assert "sync complete" on stderr.
